projectDescription: An open source, multiplatform recreation of the Heroes of Might and Magic II game engine with enhanced gameplay, graphics, and AI.
keyFeatures: Full recreation of the HoMM2 game engine written from scratch in C++
High-resolution graphics support beyond the original game's limitations
Improved AI with smarter hero and battle decision-making
Built-in map editor with random map generation
Multiplatform support: Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS, PS Vita, Nintendo Switch
20+ language translations via PO/MO localization files
Numerous UI and gameplay enhancements over the original game
Active development with frequent releases and community contributions
Developer tools for extracting and converting original game assets
publicApiSurface: icn2img — converts ICN sprites to PNG/BMP
pal2img — generates palette image from KB.PAL
til2img — extracts TIL sprites to PNG/BMP
xmi2midi — converts XMI music files to MIDI
h2dmgr — manages H2D data file contents
bin2txt — extracts data from monster animation files
extract_homm2_resources.sh — extracts game resources from original HoMM2 installation
download_demo_version.sh — downloads the free HoMM2 demo version
